name: Flooring subcontract from firm template — Holabird Academy
description: Generate a flooring subcontract using the firm's example subcontract as template, populated with scope from the awarded bid (Harborview Flooring) and specification sections gathered from the project's buyout folder

files: test_docs/Holabird-Academy/17 - Buyout/Flooring/Scope of Work/03 35 13 - CONCRETE FLOOR FINISHING.pdf
test_docs/Holabird-Academy/17 - Buyout/Flooring/Scope of Work/09 64 66 - WOOD ATHLETIC FLOORING.pdf
test_docs/Holabird-Academy/17 - Buyout/Flooring/Scope of Work/09 65 00 - RESILIENT FLOORING.pdf
test_docs/Holabird-Academy/17 - Buyout/Flooring/Scope of Work/09 67 23 - RESINOUS FLOORING.pdf
test_docs/Holabird-Academy/17 - Buyout/Flooring/Scope of Work/09 68 13 - TILE CARPETING.pdf
test_docs/Holabird-Academy/17 - Buyout/Flooring/Scope of Work/A-3.1 - FINISH SCHEDULE.pdf
inputs.user_prompt: Write a subcontract for the flooring scope using our standard template. The awarded subcontractor is Harborview Flooring, Inc. at $1,392,618. Use the bid and spec sections to build the scope of work.

expected_behavior: Reads bid PDF — extracts spec section numbers (03 35 13, 09 30 00, 09 64 66, 09 65 00, 09 67 23, 09 68 13)
Pattern-matches spec PDFs in scope docs directory using extracted spec section numbers
Reads example subcontract PDF — identifies template structure (articles, clauses, formatting)
Reads each spec PDF — extracts scope requirements per section
Produces confirmation checkpoint summarizing findings before generating
Generates template_data.json (parsed template structure with articles and content types)
Generates scope_data.json (project info, subcontractor, contract sum, spec sections, line items, exclusions)
Calls generate_subcontract_docx.py to produce .docx from the two JSONs
Output .docx references all 6 spec sections in Scope of Work article
Output .docx has correct contract sum ($1,392,618) and subcontractor name
Template's standard clauses (Insurance, Dispute Resolution) preserved unchanged
ground_truth_notes: PM-reviewed ground truth covering required document structure, article content, spec section references, and contract terms. Field value conventions: [VARIABLE] = bid-specific, [FROM_BID] = extracted from bid, [FROM_PRIME] = flows from prime contract, [PER_SPEC] = per specification.

template_preservation.description: Insurance, Dispute Resolution, Indemnification articles match template structure

spec_section_coverage.description: All 6 spec sections (03 35 13, 09 30 00, 09 64 66, 09 65 00, 09 67 23, 09 68 13) referenced in scope

scope_completeness.description: Scope items from bid line items and spec requirements included

contract_terms.description: Contract sum, subcontractor name, project name correctly populated

document_structure.description: All required articles from ground truth present in correct order

format.description: Output is a valid .docx with proper formatting

graph.description: Finding written with correct type and scope metadata
